channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Chest freezer dumped, 18th July
item.description:
Yes another dangerous chest freezer has been dumped on The Limes Avenue. It is by a tree outside number 8 The Limes Avenue. It needs to be picked up urgently.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Limes Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road sinking on by traffic light, 18th July
item.description:
Road sinking on outer lane when turning right into Lessons Hill. Approx 50cm diameter
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter all over Church House Gardens. Litter Bins full. Glassmill Path bin overflowing, 18th July
item.description:
This park is neglected! The council should be ashamed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mill Vale, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No parking site but cars are packed on kerb constantly., 18th July
item.description:
This is a no parking site, residential area, residents are paying no attention, using the access bay and kerb to park everyday,. Children have to walk on the road and there is a working building site here. Our bins have not been emptied due to cars in the access bay, this is week two.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beechwood Place, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes obstructing pavement, 18th July
item.description:
At least 4-6 lime bikes and a forest bike obstructing the pavement and crossing/ traffic lights on Kent house Road and junction with Lennard Road. Danger to children as there are 3 schools in the immediate vicinity. The have been there for over a week and the bikes are growing in number. More as time goes on.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge sitting outside evicted flat, 18th July
item.description:
There's a fridge freezer unit on the porch of this building, seemingly tied to an eviction there (at least a month ago, I think longer). It's been sitting there with its contents rotting. It's unclear why the landlord has left it there, but it's unsightly and smells bad.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Montague Square, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping by the path off chesterfield way, 18th July
item.description:
There's frequent flytipping of general waste here, as well as human waste (likely related to delivery drivers having nowhere to go to use the toilet). This is a frequent occurrence - several people in my block have mentioned it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chesterfield Way, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another! Dumped Supermarket Trolly in Church House, by the Glassmill path, 18th July
item.description:
Just inside the gardens by where Glassmill path starts is a supermarket trolley

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mill Vale, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Supermarket Trolly in Church House Gardens, 18th July
item.description:
Dumped in Brambles to the left of path from Library Gardens to 'Duck Pond'

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ethelbert Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle left abandoned for approx 2 weeks, 18th July
item.description:
Fiat Ducato motorhome has been left abandoned on GAVESTONE ROAD SE12 at the rear of number 33 GAVESTONE ROAD. No numberplates and locked

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gavestone Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked second report, 18th July
item.description:
I’ve reported blockage few days ago, been apparently fixed, but the problem is still there untouched. Terrible service

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Welling High Street, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is falling out of ground causing disruption on road, 18th July
item.description:
Tree is falling out of the ground causing issues
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lloyds Way, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass in road, 18th July
item.description:
A group if about 10 teenage boys were pushing over everyone's recycle bins. They have been left out as they were not collected on Wednesday. Bottles rolled into the street and were smashed by passing cars. I have swept as much as I can into the kerb but it needs proper clearing up.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footscray Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded wheelie bins, 18th July
item.description:
Abandoned wheelie bins at Mottingham station approach. Have been there at least four days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Station Approach Southside, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple flyposting on lamposts, 18th July
item.description:
Multiple flyposts for cars for cash and cars for scrap on lamp posts on both sides of road by Cleeve Park School At least 4 instances.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Princes Close, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypost on telegraph pole, 18th July
item.description:
On wooden telecoms pole
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 175, Penhill Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering, 18th July
item.description:
Loads of waste here. Not sure if it's collecting because of the wind or related to the fly tipping/rough sleeping in St Thomas's Recreation Ground

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mare Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars for cash flypost, 18th July
item.description:
On lampost on roundabout
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 253, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree in Ropemakers park overgrown and spans over properties, 18th July
item.description:
The trees in Ropemakers Fields Park is growing uncontrolled and is now completely spanning across a house.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pavement Regent Std Andrews Rd, 18th July
item.description:
Rubbish all over the pavement in front of Regent Studios on Andrews Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Andrews Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
